name: Invoice Extraction
input: It may take in Dataframe as an input

fields.name: userQuery
fields.title: User Query
fields.description: User-defined query or instruction describing the invoice fields and information to be extracted.

fields.name: llmConnection
fields.title: Select Connection
fields.description: Select the configured LLM connection used to process invoice data and generate structured extraction results.

fields.name: separator
fields.title: Separator
fields.description: Delimiter used to separate extracted values when constructing the output DataFrame.

fields.name: temperature
fields.title: Temperature
fields.description: Controls the determinism of the model output. Lower values produce more consistent and repeatable extractions.

fields.name: writePrompt
fields.title: System Prompt
fields.description: Optional system-level prompt used to guide extraction behavior, formatting rules, and domain-specific instructions.
